task.original:
P1-6: Gherkin + spec mutual understanding

Goal: Nicki and sheep do not advance past describe / spec until user and agent share the same understanding — not just formatted output.

describe (Nicki): Draft Gherkin; ask on ambiguity (scope, actors, acceptance). Revise until user explicitly approves story meaning. No story.md on first draft alone.

spec (sheep-spec): Read approved story; ask (via open_questions + blocked return) when requirements fork or stay vague. No spec file until resolved or user confirms trade-offs.

Gate (Harness): routing.yaml / check-gate.py — block spec without story_artifact; block subtasks while spec open_questions non-empty.

Touch: nicki.md (Describe), sheep-spec.md, spec-maker/SKILL.md, optional story-format.md / spec gate smoke.

Today: one-shot approval on describe; spec-maker asks internally but sheep may write spec with lingering open_questions — tighten loop so Nicki relays questions to user until clear.

history.summary: Worktree created from main @ 06e9211; task 6 registered; status.json initialized for describe.
User approved Gherkin story meaning with "continue". Two Features — describe asks before inventing; spec asks before writing YAML. Acceptance test anchor is tetris NEXT_STEPS task 3 ghost piece.

Spec written from approved P1-6 story with 17 testable requirements covering describe ask-before-draft, spec block-without-write, Nicki relay of open_questions, and subtasks gate on empty spec open_questions. Touch surface limited to nicki.md, sheep-spec.md, and spec-maker/SKILL.md; harness enforcement deferred to P2.

Wrote 13-line OpenSpec checklist from approved spec with empty open_questions. Covers nicki.md describe ask-before-draft, chat-only revision, scenario-by-scenario iteration, pause-on-silence, spec open_questions relay, sheep-subtask gate; sheep-spec.md block-without-write and fork-as-options; spec-maker/SKILL.md ask-first and no-spec-while-questions; out-of-scope file confirmation; and manual tetris ghost-piece describe and spec verification flows.

Implemented all 13 subtasks with minimal diffs to nicki.md (Describe ask-before-draft, chat-only revision, pause-on-silence, no describe reopen; Spec relay for open_questions), sheep-spec.md (block-without-write, fork-as-options, empty open_questions on write), and spec-maker/SKILL.md (ask-first gate, no spec while questions remain). Confirmed no edits to check-gate.py, routing.yaml, status docs, story-format.md, or smoke fixtures. Tetris ghost-piece describe/spec flows verified via traceability review against story acceptance scenarios and NEXT_STEPS.MD item 3 — full Nicki pipeline not run. No commit; no new deps.

Review approved. All 17 spec requirements met via story-maker/sheep-describe refactor and spec relay prose; traceability PASS for tetris ghost-piece describe/spec scenarios. readiness.status: ready_for_acceptance. Deferred scope: routing.yaml describe wiring, README.md story-maker listing — non-blocking.
User accepted at ready_for_acceptance with "yes". P1-6 gherkin-spec-mutual-understanding approved for sync. Deferred scope notes (routing.yaml, README) acknowledged non-blocking.
